title: German Frittata
description: A dense and deliciously German twist on the classic Italian frittata.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the caramelized onions and cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, shredded cheese, salt, pepper, and German mustard.
Pour the egg mixture over the onions in the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the eggs start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the frittata is set and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Let the frittata cool for 2-3 minutes before slicing and serving.
